name: Pan-Seared Grapefruit Simmered Salmon with Slivered Almonds
recipeIngredient: 1 pound salmon fillet, cut into 1 inch thick pieces
1 pinch red pepper flakes, to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, whisk together all the sauce ingredients and set aside.
2. Cut the salmon into equal-sized pieces so they will cook evenly.
3. Heat a nonstick skillet over high heat. Remove from heat and spray lightly with vegetable coating if using. Return to the burner and add the salmon. Sear well on one side (about 6-8 minutes) then turn and sear the second side.
4. Make room in the skillet to toast the almonds for about 1-2 minutes. Pour on the sauce mixture; reduce heat to medium and cook, covered, for about 3-4 minutes. Test for doneness; add a little water to the reducing sauce if necessary.
5. Remove from the pan and cut each serving into fourths. Serve with a pasta dish or rice. Place fish on top and pour the sauce over that. Top with plenty of cracked pepper and cilantro. Serve with steamed vegetables to balance the meal.
Suggested Side Dishes:
12 ounces soba noodles, or angel hair
4 ounces radicchio, chiffonade cut
1 tablespoon teriyaki sauce, thinned
1 pound asparagus, steamed
